action_choice_hints: action moves the robot in a direction that reduces the distance to the target
action maintains or increases clearance from obstacles while progressing toward the target
action avoids causing or maintaining intersection with obstacles
action avoids causing intersection with obstacles except when necessary to progress toward the target
action maintains a trajectory that threads between obstacles when possible
action direction is aligned with the vector from the robot to the target
action avoids sharp turns or abrupt changes in direction unless required to avoid obstacles
action maintains a safe margin from obstacles when possible
action selects a path that transitions from above to below or left to right of obstacles as needed to reach the target
action avoids reversing progress toward the target
feature_family_hints: relative-position features: needed to assess the robot's position relative to obstacles and the target
directional-alignment features: needed to evaluate if the action is aligned with the direction to the target
clearance/collision features: needed to detect and avoid intersections with obstacles
target-progress features: needed to measure reduction in distance to the target
transition-feasibility features: needed to ensure actions do not cause invalid or unsafe transitions (e.g., entering obstacles)
path-smoothness features: needed to prefer smooth, consistent motion toward the target
causal_transition_hints: actions that move the robot toward the target tend to reduce the distance to the target
actions that maintain or increase clearance from obstacles tend to avoid collisions
actions that cause intersection with obstacles tend to be followed by corrective actions to exit the obstacle
actions aligned with the target direction tend to result in steady progress toward the goal
actions that avoid abrupt direction changes tend to produce smoother, safer trajectories
actions that move the robot away from the target or into obstacles are generally avoided unless necessary for navigation
actions that transition the robot from one side of an obstacle to another are used to navigate around obstacles toward the target
